topics.label: The 2D Grid
topics.description: Code is a 2D grid. The instruction pointer moves in 4 directions (>, <, ^, v).

topics.label: Direction & Flow
topics.description: > < ^ v change direction. ? random direction. # skip next cell. @ halt.

topics.label: I/O & Branching
topics.description: . (output number), , (output char), & (input number), ~ (input char). | _ for conditionals.

topics.label: Self-Modification (p/g)
topics.description: g gets a cell value, p puts a value into the grid. Self-modifying code.
